channel.title: f20 on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in f20 on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Falls are Hard
item.description: Throughout my college career, I have found that my fall semesters are hard and my springs are long. Each fall is harder than the last. This being my senior year during a pandemic, its going to be a record breaker again. My hopes after this year are to go to graduate school, so I have (yet) to study for the GRE and take the test. I am pursuing an honor’s thesis so I will be doing extracurricular research and meetings outside of class.
